title: Align Bureau worktree leases with the narrow admin contract
goal: Make Grabowski worktree orchestration acquire Bureau's short-lived worktree-admin gate with the required contract bindings, then retain only the normal target-worktree lease, without requesting the forbidden broad Bureau repository lease.

acceptance.assertion: Bureau worktree creation uses path:/home/alex/repos/bureau/.bureau-scopes/worktree-admin rather than repo:/home/alex/repos/bureau.
The acquire call supplies bureau_phase=worktree-admin, a bounded justification, expected head or state, and a gate TTL no greater than 300 seconds.
After worktree creation the admin gate is released and the target worktree lease is renewed or reacquired as a normal work-phase lease without an unleased mutation window.
Contract findings such as invalid TTL, mixed Bureau/non-Bureau resources and missing bindings are surfaced distinctly instead of collapsed to generic contract-unhealthy.
Tests and a live dry-run cover successful creation, broad-lease refusal, TTL refusal, mixed-resource separation and post-create lease readback.

reproduction.mixed_bureau_and_service_keys: Bureau and non-Bureau resources must be acquired separately

metadata.sequencing_reason: The currently active GRIP-ROADMAP-V1-T014 work touches the orchestration area; this follow-up waits for that slice and then revalidates whether the mismatch remains.
does_not_establish: permission to weaken Bureau's narrow lease contract
permission to acquire the broad Bureau repository lease
permission to alter an active foreign worktree
